notes: Good Friday - gym closed. Success on sleep reset with a massive recovery block. Added psyllium husk for digestion/satiety.

sleep.notes: 9hr 21min. Significant recovery sleep following the all-nighter attempt. Large block from approx 4 AM to 10 AM, plus an afternoon recovery session shown in tracker.
